introSection: Wild Mouse was a hybrid wild mouse roller coaster built by UK manufacturer Maxwell that was previously located at Chipperfield's Amusement Park in Weymouth, Dorset, England, UK.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Steel track with wooden supports akin to B.A. Schiff & Associates Wild Mouse coasters.

fullText:
Wild Mouse was a hybrid wild mouse roller coaster built by UK manufacturer Maxwell that was previously located at Chipperfield's Amusement Park in Weymouth, Dorset, England, UK.

Steel track with wooden supports akin to B.A. Schiff & Associates Wild Mouse coasters.
